label: 自然大地版
texture_guidance: 亚麻、陶土、木纹、植物叶片、晨光和真实食材纹理。
scene_prompt: NATURAL EARTH FRESH POSTER. light: morning window light from upper left, soft leaf shadow across table, warm fill from front, no studio flash. material: linen cloth, unglazed ceramic, light wood, woven basket, herbs, leaves, natural food texture, breathable air. color: sage #8FAE8B, oat #E9DCC5, clay #B97855, warm ivory #FFF7EA, small fresh green accent. composition: layered organic arrangement with hero dish in lower middle occupying 40-50%; headline sits in the upper-center area (horizontally centered or right-of-center, starting BELOW 15% from top) keeping the TOP-LEFT corner (upper 15% height × left 30% width) free of text for brand logo overlay — soft leaf shadows or gentle light are fine there; botanical foreground frames one side only. avoid: no red-black spicy palette, no neon, no metallic luxury, no crowded market background, no fake perfect plastic vegetables, no headline text in top-left logo zone.
design_lessons: 自然感来自光线和材质可信度，不是简单铺绿色背景。
